seoTitle: Pile Gully vs Pilton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pile Gully and Pilton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pile Gully vs Pilton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pile Gully and Pilton.
heading: Pile Gully vs Pilton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pile Gully, Queensland and Pilton, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pilton has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Pile Gully (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pile Gully or Pilton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pile Gully has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Pilton scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pile Gully scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Pilton scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pile Gully or Pilton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pilton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
